title: Conic Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Read-only reentrancy exploit in oracle contract CurveLPOracleV2

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls totalSupply() on oracle contracts within the same transaction as a withdrawal or deposit.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls totalSupply() on oracle contracts within the same transaction as a withdrawal or deposit.
summary: Conic Finance suffered a $4.2M loss due to a read-only reentrancy exploit in their oracle contract CurveLPOracleV2. A similar vulnerability was present but not triggered due to a mix-up between ETH and WETH addresses.
